title: Multi‑Brand Voucher Usage
description: Where can I use my multi‑brand gift card/e‑voucher, and what are the restrictions?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive list of retailers that accept specific multi‑brand electronic gift cards (e.g., UpCadhoc, Illicado, Galeries Lafayette) along with usage rules such as online versus in‑store acceptance, expiration dates, allowed transaction amounts, and any exceptions such as catering or services.

title: Healthy Lamb Tajine
description: How can I prepare a low‑fat, authentically Moroccan lamb tajine that meets my dietary restrictions?
narrative: The user wants a detailed, step‑by‑step recipe for a traditionally cooked lamb tajine that is lower in fat and uses lean lamb cuts or healthy substitutes, while still incorporating authentic Moroccan spices and providing nutritional or calorie information. Relevant documents will list exact ingredients, cooking times, and health‑friendly substitutions; documents that only mention lamb mice, general Moroccan cuisine, or unrelated pastries are not relevant.

title: Used Car Amsterdam 15km Budget
description: Find a used petrol car in the Amsterdam area, priced under €10 000, no more than 80 000 km, built after 2015, with a verified vehicle history report.
narrative: The user is looking for a practical, low‑maintenance vehicle within a short travel distance. Relevance is determined by documents that specify exact location (within 15 km of Amsterdam), price limit, fuel type, mileage, year of manufacture, and availability of a validated history report (e.g., via Histovec).

title: Mushroom Veal Paupiettes
description: Looking for a detailed recipe to make veal paupiettes with mushrooms using a pressure cooker (or slow‑cooker) that includes a creamy white‑wine‑mustard glaze, and ideas for complementary side dishes.
narrative: The user needs a practical, step‑by‑step cooking guide that: 1) confirms the use of veal cutlets rolled with a mushroom stuffing, 2) provides instructions for sealing and cooking in a pressure or slow cooker, 3) specifies the sauce composition (white wine, mustard, balsamic, cream), and 4) offers suggestions for sides such as roasted vegetables, mashed potatoes, or fresh pasta that pair well with the dish. Relevance is determined by the presence of these cooking method details, ingredient listings, and side‑dish recommendations within the document.

title: Year‑Round Car Care
description: What steps should I take to preserve a car that remains parked outdoors all season, considering temperature, humidity, UV, rodents, and other environmental threats?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on long‑term outdoor vehicle protection, including best practices for shade, moisture control, UV shielding, rodent deterrence, battery maintenance, and legal compliance for window treatments. Relevant documents should discuss preventive measures, product options (solar window film, sun visors, insulation), and maintenance schedules, rather than generic automotive accessories or unrelated battery life topics.

title: Eco‑Friendly Women’s Basics
description: Which Petit Bateau women's T‑shirts are made of 100% organic cotton and available in standard sizes?
narrative: The user wants precisely those Petit Bateau shirts that combine classic brand style with environmental responsibility. Relevance hinges on mention of 100% organic cotton, the women's T‑shirt subset, and size availability. Items that refer only to general collections, kid or men's lines, or that lack a sustainable fabric claim are considered non‑relevant.

title: Renault Employee Car
description: What are the benefits, discount rates, warranty terms, and purchasing options for buying a Renault employee/car (collaborator car) compared to regular used or new cars?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on Renault collaborator vehicle purchases, including discount percentages, warranty coverage, age and mileage criteria, financing options, and comparisons to other dealer offerings. Relevant documents must contain specific discount figures, LOA leasing terms, and the conditions under which the collaborator program operates.

title: War School e‑book Ordering
description: How do I purchase, download, and receive e‑books from the School of War website?
narrative: I need clear, step‑by‑step instructions for buying a War School e‑book, including supported formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), handling the three download links, choosing payment via credit card or bank transfer, managing my account and personal data, understanding delivery timelines (post office, Chronopost, print‑on‑demand delays), and how website cookies affect the checkout and account experience.

title: Reloading ARE Rights
description: What are the eligibility conditions and procedures for reloading (rechargeable) unemployment benefits after returning to work in France?
narrative: The user seeks a precise explanation of the French ARE reloading mechanism: the required minimum period of work (hours/days and time frame), the impact of voluntary vs involuntary resignation, the interaction with the right of option, and the timelines for renewal or refusal. They also want to understand how a new employment spell affects the residual entitlement, what documentation is needed, and how the benefit amount may change under the “right of option”. The answer must focus solely on these eligibility and procedural nuances, excluding unrelated topics such as intermittent regimes or health coverage.

title: AXA Client Activation
description: How can I activate and log into my AXA client space for both insurance and banking services, and what should I do if I lose my credentials?
narrative: The user is a new AXA customer seeking step‑by‑step instructions for creating their client space, retrieving login identifiers, recovering passwords, and understanding the difference between the online insurance portal and the AXA Bank portal. Relevance requires documents that provide procedural details, official login URLs, and troubleshooting tips for credential issues.

title: Electric Vehicle Subsidies in France
description: What are the current purchase subsidies, tax incentives, battery warranty terms, and how do they affect the overall cost of a new electric car compared to a combustion engine vehicle in France?
narrative: The user is planning to buy a new vehicle in France and wants a comprehensive assessment of all financial incentives specific to electric vehicles, including the green bonus, conversion premium, retrofit premium, second-hand bonus, and registration tax exemptions, as well as battery guarantee details. Relevant documents must cover these subsidies, tax breaks, and warranty policies; unrelated content such as Crit'Air stickers, general vehicle specs, or charging infrastructure guides that do not address the subsidy details are not relevant.

title: Potato Downy Mildew
description: What measures can I take to prevent, detect, and treat downy mildew in my potato crop, and are potatoes infected with this disease safe to eat?
narrative: I am a small‑scale potato farmer looking for detailed, practical guidance on managing downy mildew. I need specific prevention strategies (soil preparation, crop rotation, resistant varieties), detection cues, cultural controls, and chemical/organic treatments (including bicarbonate solutions). Additionally, I want clear recommendations about post‑harvest handling: should tubers showing mildewing symptoms be discarded, or can they still be safely consumed? Relevant answers will cover these technical and safety aspects; information about unrelated diseases, general gardening tips, or unrelated product marketing will be considered non‑relevant.

title: Three- Day Darkness
description: When are the three days of darkness predicted to occur, and which planetary events (pole shift, Nibiru, meteorite impacts) are linked to it in the prophecies?
narrative: The user seeks specific dates or timeframes for the predicted three‑day darkness, as well as a list of associated events such as pole shift, Nibiru’s approach, and meteorite or volcanic activity, based on documents that discuss Padre Pio’s prophecies, Nibiru, and related new‑age theories. Documents that only discuss unrelated new‑age content or animal rescues are not relevant.

title: Spaceballs Streaming & Details
description: How can I watch the 1987 film Spaceballs online and find details about its cast, plot, and production?
narrative: The user wants specific information about the film *Spaceballs* (1987), including legitimate, location‑agnostic streaming options (free or paid), a concise synopsis, cast list, and production background (director, release year, runtime). Documents that mention *Spaceballs* or its French title *La Folle Histoire de l’Espace*, provide official streaming links or legal download possibilities, and contain film metadata are considered relevant. Content about other films, unrelated movies, or non‑film topics (e.g., Movember, unrelated documentaries) should be ignored.

title: Season 6 Release
description: What is the confirmed release date, episode count, and renewal status for season 6 of Le Bureau des Légendes?
narrative: The user is a fan planning to watch the upcoming season and needs up‑to‑date official information—such as a definitive release date, episode number, and whether the series has been formally renewed. Relevant documents will include announcements from Canal+, interviews with showrunners, press releases, and credible entertainment news outlets that discuss the sixth season’s production and scheduling. Documents that only mention earlier seasons, unrelated shows, or fan speculation without official confirmation should be considered not relevant.

title: Prediction Verb Usage
description: What are the precise definitions and formal usage patterns of the term 'prediction' and the verb 'prevail' (or its French equivalent 'prévaloir') in English and French contexts?
narrative: The user seeks an in‑depth linguistic profile that includes: formal definitions of 'prediction' as a noun, grammatical explanations, and illustrative sentences; the conjugation and semantic range of the verb 'prevail', including its French counterpart 'prévaloir'; distinctions between similar terms such as 'prevalence' or 'prediction' in statistical or prophetic senses; and recommended contexts (e.g., political rhetoric, scientific forecasting) where each form is appropriately applied. Relevance is judged by presence of authoritative lexical entries, conjugation tables, and authentic example sentences; non‑relevant documents that discuss unrelated topics such as geography, child support, or general cultural descriptions are excluded.

title: Rendez‑Vous Remote Episodes
description: Which episodes of the French TV series *Rendez‑vous en terre inconnue* feature celebrities traveling to remote indigenous communities, and what are the details of each visit (date, celebrity, location, indigenous group, episode number)?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive, episode‑by‑episode inventory of *Rendez‑vous en terre inconnue* that focuses on visits to remote, often threatened, indigenous peoples.  Relevance criteria include: (1) the episode is officially broadcast as part of the series; (2) a named French or international celebrity is the main participant; (3) the destination is a real, geographically remote area inhabited by an indigenous group (e.g., Masoala in Madagascar, Kogi in Colombia, San in Bolivia, etc.); (4) the episode’s broadcast date, episode number, and the indigenous group’s name are documented.  The user wants this information to study the show's coverage of cross‑cultural encounters, to locate specific episodes for viewing or research, and to ensure the list excludes unrelated content such as re‑broadcasts, summaries, or unrelated documentaries.

title: Dinner Party Truffle Potatoes
description: What allergens and vegetarian suitability does the Frozen Black Truffle Potato Crush contain for guests with dietary restrictions?
narrative: The user is planning an upscale dinner party and wants to ensure that the Black Truffle Potato Crush can be served to guests who may have allergies (e.g., gluten, soy, nuts, dairy) or follow a vegetarian (lacto‑ovo) diet. Relevance is determined by documents that list the full ingredient and allergen profile, indicate the vegetarian label, provide cooking instructions, and any user reviews or specifications that confirm these attributes. Non‑relevant documents lacking these details or unrelated to the product are excluded.

title: Paris Event Venue Search
description: Find suitable large event rooms in Paris, especially near Charenton, that can host up to 300 attendees and offer requisite facilities
narrative: The user is planning a significant gathering (convention, wedding or corporate event) and needs an event space in Paris that is close to the Charenton area. Relevance requires the venue to have a large floor area (around 3000 m² or more), proven capacity for at least 300 guests, and a record of hosting numerous events (e.g., 300 events per year). The venue should provide contact information (phone or email) and preferably have a website link for booking details, pricing, and available amenities such as catering, audiovisual equipment, and parking. Documents that mention other unrelated topics or venues located elsewhere or unrelated to event hosting are considered non‑relevant.}

title: Green Supply Comparison
description: I want to compare French electricity suppliers to find the cheapest 100% green option with transparent billing and good customer service.
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed comparison of French electricity suppliers that provide 100% renewable energy, dynamic or transparent pricing, clear and non-hidden fees, and reliable customer support. Relevance is judged by whether a document offers up‑to‑date price information, explains the supplier’s green credentials (e.g., Guarantees of Origin), discusses contract flexibility and switch procedures, and addresses service quality issues such as response times and local support. Documents that simply mention green energy without giving cost or service details, or that focus on unrelated topics, are considered less relevant.

title: Kia Electric SUV Options
description: What are the available Kia electric SUVs in France, their price ranges, battery ranges, and warranty details, and how do they compare to similar hybrid models in terms of total cost of ownership?
narrative: The user is a budget‑conscious buyer considering an electric crossover from Kia. They want a concise comparison of the main electric models (e.g., Kia Niro EV, Kia EV6, Kia Optima EV) versus comparable plug‑in hybrids in terms of starting MSRP, quoted electric range, warranty coverage, and any relevant safety recalls. Relevance requires documents that include official MSRP figures, battery kWh and km ranges, warranty period details, and any recall or safety information; documents lacking these specifics are considered non‑relevant.

title: Gallic Roots in Modern France
description: What is the historical contribution of the ancient Gauls to the genetic and cultural identity of contemporary French people, and how is this reflected in current national narratives?
narrative: The user seeks a nuanced scholarly understanding of the legacy of the Gauls in France, especially differentiating between historical fact, archaeological evidence, and the mythologised narratives that have shaped French national identity. Relevance requires sources that provide evidence from archaeology, linguistics, historical demography, and historiography, and that discuss the evolution of the ‘Gaulian ancestor’ myth from antiquity to the modern era. Non‑evidence‑based or purely fictional accounts such as comic series or unrelated cultural references are not relevant.

title: Faro Car Rental
description: I need the cheapest car rental at Faro airport that allows a one‑way return to the city center with free cancellation up to 24 hours before pick‑up.
narrative: The user is planning a short stay in the Algarve and wants to rent a car upon arrival at Faro airport. They prioritize the lowest total price, the option to return the car at a different location (e.g., Faro city center), and a free cancellation policy valid at least 24 hours prior to pickup. Relevant documents should include up‑to‑date price comparisons, pickup/return locations, one‑way rental details, and explicit cancellation terms. Non‑relevant documents that only discuss flights, unrelated rental agencies, or unrelated destinations should be ignored.

title: Nantes Station vs Airport Car Rental
description: What are the differences in cost, convenience, and vehicle options between renting a car at Nantes train station and at Nantes Airport?
narrative: The user is a traveler arriving by train who hopes to acquire a vehicle immediately upon arrival. The topic focuses on comparing the two most common pickup points in Nantes: the South Station (Gare Sud) and the Nantes Atlantique Airport. It requires relevance to documents that describe the agency location, opening hours (24/7 self‑service at the station, 07:00‑23:30 at the airport), age and licence restrictions, typical vehicle categories offered (economy, compact, utility, etc.), the possibility of one‑way rentals, and pricing information. The answer should also note the driving experience differences (public transport proximity, parking logistics) and any special services such as the ADA’s Bluetooth key system or Europcar’s loyalty benefits. Documents that address such details are considered relevant; documents solely about other brands or unrelated accommodations are not.}

title: Disease‑Resistant Selection
description: How can I choose potato varieties that resist common diseases and pests for home gardens while also understanding practical disease control measures?
narrative: The user seeks to integrate cultivar selection with disease and pest management for sustainable cultivation, requiring documents that outline disease types, symptoms, treatments, and variety resistance traits; relevance is granted only to sources that discuss both effective control measures and the disease‑resistant characteristics of potato varieties.

title: Beaujolais Crus vs Nouveau
description: I want to understand the differences between Beaujolais Nouveau and the other Beaujolais crus, including wine characteristics, terroir, production methods, and where I can taste or purchase them.
narrative: The user is an enthusiast wanting a nuanced comparison of Beaujolais wines. Relevant documents should discuss the Beaujolais region, its crus, Beaujolais Nouveau, terroir, production practices, and tasting or purchase venues; documents unrelated to wine (e.g., sporting events, general tourism, or other unrelated sites) are not relevant.

title: Choosing Boat Shoes
description: What features should I consider when buying boat shoes for my sailing trip?
narrative: The user wants a detailed comparison of boat shoe options, focusing on construction materials (leather versus nubuck, water‑resistant finishes), sole traction and slip resistance, durability in marine environments, fit and sizing, brand reputation, price ranges, and practical aspects such as delivery times and return policies. Relevance requires documents that discuss these technical and practical criteria, compare models across brands, and provide up‑to‑date pricing and service information for both on‑water and urban use.

title: Renault E‑Tech Lease
description: Which Renault electric or plug‑in hybrid model and lease contract best suits a family of five that needs at least 400 km WLTP range, a 37‑month lease, a maximum monthly payment of €1,200, and includes the full €6,000 eco‑bonus and conversion premium?
narrative: The user wants to compare lease options for Renault’s electric/plug‑in hybrid lineup, focusing on models that fit a five‑seat family, guaranteeing at least 400 km WLTP range. Relevance criteria include a 37‑month term, a maximum monthly cost of €1,200 (after discounts), inclusion of the full ecological bonus, and coverage of the conversion premium. Documents should provide model specifications, lease terms (first rent, monthly pay, mileage limits), and bonus details to assess compliance.

title: Corfu Rental Criteria
description: Which car rental providers in Corfu best meet a medium‑season weekend holiday with free cancellation, unlimited mileage, eco‑friendly options, and affordable price?
narrative: The user is planning a short‑term vacation in Corfu and wants a rental car that can be collected either at the airport or in the city centre. The ideal provider must: 1) offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before pickup, 2) provide unlimited mileage, 3) offer vehicles in the Mini or Economy category at or below €20 per day, and 4) include insurance coverage with no hidden fees. The user also prefers operators with an environmentally conscious policy (e.g., Europcar Green Charter) and flexible pick‑up/drop‑off locations. Relevance will be judged by the presence of up‑to‑date pricing, cancellation terms, mileage policies, insurance details, environmental claims, and the availability of the vehicle in the specified category and location.

title: Réunion Car Hire
description: Looking for a reliable, cost‑effective car rental agency to use during a holiday on Réunion Island, with details on pickup, delivery, insurance options, and special services such as child seats.
narrative: The user wants to compare car rental options for a holiday on Réunion. Criteria include agency location (airport or city), vehicle variety, unlimited mileage, all‑risk insurance, free child seats, 24‑hour assistance, and competitive rates. Relevance is constrained to agencies providing these services; unrelated hiking or accommodation content is excluded.

title: Budget electric SUV
description: Which used electric SUVs in France cost under €45,000, have less than 5 years’ age, mileage below 50,000 km, and a range of at least 200 km?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date listings of used electric SUVs available in France that meet a strict price ceiling while also satisfying age, mileage, and minimum range constraints. Relevance is indicated by records that include all four of these attributes, along with current availability and price. Vehicles from any manufacturer are acceptable as long as they satisfy the defined criteria.

title: Road Accident Compensation
description: What factors determine the compensation amount for a person injured in a road accident in France?
narrative: The user seeks a thorough explanation of the French legal framework for road‑accident compensation, including the Badinter law, categories of damages (bodily injury, aesthetic, sexual, loss of future earnings, etc.), the scoring system (AIPP, BE), and practical examples of compensation calculations for different injury classes and accident contexts. Relevant documents should provide legal references, calculation procedures, and illustrative case studies rather than generic traffic news or unrelated film content.

title: Arena Event Access
description: I want to attend an event at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux and need information on accessibility, parking, and how to make a reservation.
narrative: The user is specifically targeting Arkéa Arena events in Bordeaux, looking for a comprehensive guide that covers how to reserve tickets, accommodates guests with reduced mobility or disabilities, informs about available parking options like Parcub, and provides the contact line for dedicated assistance. Relevance is measured by documents that list event schedules, describe accessibility measures and provide a dedicated phone number for disabled guests, as well as any parking information associated with the venue.

title: Women Farmers Archives & Wikipedia
description: Where can I locate primary archival documents on women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire, and how can I use them to create or improve Wikipedia entries?
narrative: The user seeks archival materials that document the experiences of women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire (e.g., letters held in the Menie Grégoire fonds, other departmental records) and wants to know how to turn those documents into accessible online content, specifically through contributions to Wikipedia. Relevance scores documents that mention the Departmental Archives, the Menie Grégoire fonds, the Wikipedia workshop, or similar resources on feminist history. Documents that provide unrelated weather data, football club announcements, or commercial product listings are considered irrelevant.

title: Energy Bill Escalation
description: Which steps should a customer follow to contest an ENGIE energy bill after initial customer service is unsatisfactory?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed, step‑by‑step escalation guide—including time‑limits, contact hierarchy, and applicable legal references—to effectively challenge an energy bill, so only documents that provide this procedure are considered relevant.

title: Gaming & Design PCs
description: Which budget desktop PCs are best for high‑end graphic design and gaming, and do they include bundled Microsoft 365 deals?
narrative: The user wants to compare desktop or PC options in the 500–1500€ range that deliver strong CPU/GPU performance for graphic design software (e.g., Photoshop, Blender) and modern games. They also care about memory, storage, display compatibility, and additional features such as external docks. Importantly, they want any promotional bundles that include Microsoft 365 Family. The relevant documents provide product listings, technical specs, price points, and promotion details from French retailers like FNAC and Darty, while the non‑relevant content does not address these specific criteria.

title: Silver Print Evolution
description: How have silver printing processes in photography developed from the 19th century to today?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive, chronological account of silver-based photographic printing techniques. They want detailed descriptions of each major process (e.g., daguerreotype, calotype, wet & dry collodion, gelatin silver), including the key inventors, the chemical compositions, and the dates these methods emerged and fell out of use. The narrative also seeks context on how silver printing transitioned into the era of digital photography, emphasizing the historical progression and technological milestones. Documents that provide accurate dates, process steps, chemical details, and historical commentary on these methods meet the relevance criteria; records that focus solely on modern digital techniques or unrelated photography topics do not.

title: Leek Quiche Inquiry
description: Where can I find a reliable, step‑by‑step recipe for making leek quiche, including a clear ingredient list and cooking instructions?
narrative: The user is looking for a concrete, trustworthy recipe to cook leek quiche. Relevant documents should provide detailed preparation steps, ingredient amounts, cooking times, and any helpful tips or variations. Non‑recipe material such as marketing, unrelated articles, or incomplete listings are not relevant. The goal is to identify recipes that can be directly followed in a kitchen, ensuring the information is accurate and informative.

title: Free Browser Car Games
description: What are the best free car games that can be played directly in a web browser with multiplayer support and no download?
narrative: The user seeks to find high‑quality, legally available car racing or stunt games that run in the browser, ideally with online multiplayer features, while distinguishing them from paid, downloadable, or non‑browser options.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What conditions, types of assistance, and application steps does Pôle emploi offer for job seekers needing travel, accommodation, or meal support for distant job interviews or training?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of all mobility assistance programmes managed by Pôle emploi, including the SAM host‑family network, travel vouchers (SNCF reservation and travel vouchers), and financial reimbursement for travel, accommodation, and meals. Relevance criteria include documents detailing eligibility thresholds (e.g., >60 km round‑trip or >2 h travel, contract type >=3 months, unemployment status), cost limits (€5 000 yearly, €10 host‑family contribution, €30 per night accommodation, €6 per day meals), application timelines (submit before the interview or within 7 days afterward), and specific procedures (e.g., contacting the SAM relay, submitting receipts for reimbursement). Excluded content concerns unrelated topics such as occupational immersion, car purchase assistance, or training funding, which do not directly address mobility assistance eligibility.

title: SFR Login & Reset
description: I need step‑by‑step guidance on how to log into my SFR client area, reset my password, and link my email address, especially since I’m a former Numericable customer.
narrative: The user is looking for precise procedures for accessing the SFR client space, including how to use the account ID, restore a forgotten password via backup email or SMS, and associate a new email with the account. Relevant documents should explain the login sequence, password‑reset workflow, and email‑linking instructions for customers who migrated from Numericable to SFR. Information that only describes invoicing, generic service listings, or unrelated Digital/Numericable account management is not relevant to this specific user need.

title: Vintage Oil Lamps
description: What vintage oil lamp models and accessories should I purchase for outdoor decorative lighting?
narrative: The user is shopping for a retro‑style oil lamp to use outdoors and wants recommendations on suitable models, wick types, compatible fuels, and brand options that combine aesthetic appeal with reliable performance. Relevance should include recent product comparisons, specifications, and buying tips, while excluding generic maintenance tutorials or unrelated product details.

title: Madeira Car Hire
description: Where can I get a fully insured, no‑deductible car rental at Madeira Airport for a 10‑day trip in July that is suitable for steep mountain roads and has no hidden fees?
narrative: The user wants a clear, comprehensive recommendation for renting a car at Madeira Airport during July.  Key relevance criteria include: a one‑stop booking with total price displayed (all taxes, insurance, fuel, and any extra services), full insurance with zero deductible, a vehicle model proven adequate for steep mountain terrain, no hidden charges or surprise add‑ons, and a straightforward pick‑up/return process at the airport.  The ideal documents will also confirm the calendar availability and any seasonal discounts relevant to the July booking period.

title: Sprouted Potato Safety
description: Is it safe to eat sprouted potatoes, and if so, how should they be cleaned and cooked to avoid health risks?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive, evidence‑based guidance on the safety of consuming sprouted potatoes.  Relevant documents discuss solanine toxicity, safe dosage thresholds, and the necessity of removing sprouts and green tissue before cooking.  The user also wants practical cooking instructions, such as whether to peel potatoes before boiling, the effect of cooling in cooking water, and recommended preparation methods (e.g., boiling, sautéing, baking) that minimize solanine retention.  Therefore, documents that cover solanine content, safe consumption limits, removal techniques, and cooking guidelines are relevant, while unrelated potato recipes or unrelated cooking methods are not.

title: Return‑to‑Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What specific conditions must a RSA beneficiary meet to qualify for, and how does one apply for, the back‑to‑work bonus in France?
narrative: The user is a French citizen currently receiving RSA and seeking to return to employment. They need to know whether the bonus is still in force, the precise eligibility criteria (RSA receipt, type of employment contract, minimum working hours, duration, salary thresholds), the required documentation (employment contract, pay slips, proof of RSA, tax declarations), the timing of application and payment, and any regional variations or recent policy changes. Relevance requires documents that explain eligibility, procedure, timelines, and any discussions on discontinuation or replacement with other supports.
